sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.50 of 2026 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No.478/2026 2. For order on CMA No.479/2026 3. For hearing of main case 13.05.2026 Mr. Naseer Ahmed Abbasi Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Aleem, Advocate for the applicant On 06.05.2026, following order was passed: “Learned counsel seeks time. At his request, to come up on 13.05.2026.” Today once again learned counsel holding brief for learned counsel for the applicant seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested to proceed with this reference. Therefore, in view of the judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Sindh Revenue Board, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Asif
